hle.canonical_pass_notes: Memory tests sub-suite captured under hle BIOS mode. Runners diverge on this test - each produces a different hash. No automatic consensus. Visual verification of each per-runner screenshot is required to determine which runner reached the test ROM's canonical pass state and which produced different counts or failed earlier. The 'captured' status means the hash is recorded but the pass/fail decision is deferred to a future human-verification pass.

mgba.notes: Hash captured. Visual verification pending - see screenshot for the actual pass/fail count this runner produced.

hle.canonical_pass_notes: Shifter (barrel shifter) tests sub-suite. 3-way pixel-identical agreement across mgba, NBA, and skyemu - strong cross-runner consensus that this is the test ROM's canonical pass image. cable_club is in its mgba-suite menu-navigation stuck state and didn't reach the test.

mgba.notes: 3-way pixel-identical agreement with NBA and skyemu - strongest possible cross-runner signal for canonical pass. Shifter (barrel shifter) tests test all-pass count visible in screenshot.
